title: accessing sys.functions from another schema
poc: create schema if not exits working;
bug_features_seed: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS test_schema;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE NOT NULL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'First entry'), (2, NULL, 'Second entry'), (3, 20.0, 'Third entry');
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
